chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-180 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 03.06.2022 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. == Inter alia, it is the case of the petitioner that he and his family members are being harassed by the respondents to be involved in false cases, therefore, they to be restrained from registering false F.I.Rs against him and his family members. The registration of the F.I.R is legal course; same could not be prevented by this Court, under the presumption that if these are registered would be false. However, it is directed, that the petitioner and his family members to be dealt with by the respondents in accordance with law. Instant petition is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E Muhammad Danish*
